name: Dutch Leek Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend together the flour, bouillon cubes, and water until well combined.
2. Gradually stir in the milk and mace, mixing until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a pot and bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Once boiling, reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the leeks and cream, then return to a gentle simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Serve with cheese on top of the soup at the table.
